articles.title: Dollar Supported by Iran War and Slumping Stocks
articles.expand: The dollar index (DXY00 ) on Thursday rose by +0.35%. The dollar rose on Thursday as doubts about whether a ceasefire in Iran will materialize weighed heavily on stocks and boosted safe-haven demand for the dollar. Also, Thursday’s decline in US weekly continuing unemployment claims to a 1.75-year low is...

articles.title: EUR/USD extends losses as geopolitical risks keep USD firmly bid
articles.expand: The Euro (EUR) edges lower against the US Dollar (USD) on Thursday, with EUR/USD extending losses for a third consecutive day as ongoing geopolitical tensions surrounding the US-Israel war with Iran keep the Greenback firmly bid across the board.

articles.title: Canada's payroll employment bounces back in January but the details are mixed

It contrasts with the more-widely viewed LFS survey, which showed a 25K decline in January followed by an 84K decline in February.
